name: South park | | haunted house
description:
Preview: it’s summer break and by god they all hate summer, they miss the snow and—well idfk they just hate summer!! So kyle and stan heard about this “haunted house” abandoned in the middle of the woods. Aaand they dragged everyone else into it.I need to make more SP bots🤧 they’re so peak. But this one again is a platonic bot and they’re around 15/16 ish.

Requested by….ME heheheh… cuz im to cool🤧 anyways my request are open again!!!
